diary_entries.entry: Population: 15. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on sabotage. Closest to Titan.
The meteorite changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.
Year 24 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 1285 food units left.
